name: ifl-ios-standards
description: Boardy+VIP iOS engineering standards for Codex. Ships specialist agents, pattern-neutral brain process-stage skills (brain-design, brain-architect, brain-plan, brain-execute, brain-testing, brain-review, brain-flow end-to-end automation), a QUICK_REF-driven router skill plus clustered boardy task skills (boardy-new-module, boardy-new-board, boardy-io-interface, boardy-communication, boardy-service-layer, boardy-plugin-composition, boardy-testing, boardy-review, boardy-refactor, boardy-troubleshoot, boardy-adopt), the full architecture rulebook + specs + process standards as bundled reference, and Bazel module/board scaffolders.

interface.shortDescription: Boardy+VIP iOS architecture standards, agents, and scaffolders
interface.longDescription: Brings the Boardy+VIP iOS engineering standard into Codex: pattern-neutral brain process-stage skills (design, architect, plan, execute, testing, review, plus brain-flow end-to-end automation), a boardy task-routing skill set (new module/board, IO interface, communication, service layer, plugin composition, testing, review, refactor, troubleshoot, adopt), specialist agents for delegated delivery, the full rulebook + specs + process standards (docs-organization, lean-verification) as bundled reference, and Bazel module/board scaffolders. Reference paths shown as ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/standards/… resolve relative to this plugin's root under Codex.
defaultPrompt: Add a new Boardy VIP module to this iOS project
Review this Swift code against the Boardy+VIP standards
Scaffold a viewless board in module X
